sections.paragraph:
Original: עוּתי

Transliteration: ‛ûthay

Phonetic: oo-thah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Uthai = "helpful"
  1. son of Ammihud and a descendant of Pharez of Judah
  2. one of the sons of Bigvai who returned from exile with the 2nd caravan with Ezra

Origin: from H5790

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
